root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_pres(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_address , sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major , sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.group_major_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_major and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' --and sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = '000005' /*WHERE*/
